scripts.build:frontend: mkdir -p dist/sounds && bun build src/frontend/script.ts --outfile dist/script.js --target browser --minify && cp src/frontend/index.html dist/ && cp src/frontend/style.css dist/ && cp -r public/sounds/. dist/sounds/ && cp public/_redirects dist/ && cp public/_headers dist/ && cp public/phrases.json dist/ && cp public/privacy.html dist/ && cp public/stats.html dist/
scripts.build:ext: rm -rf extension/dist && mkdir -p extension/dist/sounds extension/dist/icons && bun build src/frontend/script.ts --outfile extension/dist/script.js --target browser --minify && cp src/frontend/newtab.html extension/dist/ && cp src/frontend/style.css extension/dist/ && cp -r public/sounds/. extension/dist/sounds/ && cp public/phrases.json extension/dist/ && cp extension/manifest.json extension/dist/ && cp extension/background.js extension/dist/ && (cp -r extension/icons/. extension/dist/icons/ 2>/dev/null || true) && cp -r extension/_locales extension/dist/_locales
scripts.build: bun run build:frontend && bun run build:worker && bun run build:ext
scripts.dev: bun run build && bunx wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: bun run build:frontend && bun run build:worker && bun run deploy:do && bunx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name hooponopono --commit-dirty=true
scripts.type-check: bun x tsc --noEmit -p src/worker/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p src/frontend/tsconfig.json
